author: Netflix Anime
text:
She has her dad's spirit #Akanebanashi
Akane steps onto the stage and proves that talent runs deep, as her performance carries the spirit of her father's Rakugo.

See how Akane makes the stage her own in Akane-banashi, now playing globally on Netflix with dubs. New episodes release weekly.

https://www.netflix.com/title/82701514

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/33okaL0

She has her dad's spirit #Akanebanashi
https://www.youtube.com/@netflixanime

As a child, Akane witnesses a shocking event during her father's career-defining show. Now in high school, she vows to reach the art's highest rank.
